scripts.zip: pnpm build && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$v=(Get-Content package.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json).version; if (!(Test-Path release)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path release | Out-Null }; $out='release/115m-extension-v' + $v + '.zip'; Compress-Archive -Path 'dist/*' -DestinationPath $out -Force"
